positive: A central, symmetrical composition featuring stylized celestial woodland creatures: a stylized fox and a serene owl resting among glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate ferns. The style should be a blend of vintage scientific illustration and modern ethereal tattoo art. Use highly saturated jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted with deep midnight blues and glowing cyan highlights. The overall mood is magical and whimsical, suitable for an apparel print. Focus on clean, defined linework and stark silhouette contrast against a slightly textured, pale parchment background. The composition should allow the main subjects to be easily cropped and scaled. Studio quality, vector-art precision, highly detailed, centered, high contrast.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, celebrity, lowres, bad anatomy, ugly, messy, extra limbs, cropped, out of focus
